title: 'This will expose our people to Ebola': Big protest in Kenya against quarantine centre for affected US citizens
summary_full: Youths in Kenya's Laikipia region protested plans for an Ebola quarantine center at the local air base, intended for Americans exposed to the virus. The High Court has suspended the facility's establishment pending a hearing, with petitioners citing concerns over Kenya's healthcare system's fragility and potential local exposure.
